creator: lofi@FreeBSD.org
text:
First off, thanks for hacking on this!

Could you submit this patch to bugs.kde.org (file a bug for the media
kioslave), so the code-maintainer can sort out making it work with both
Linux and FreeBSD? We could then import the final version (after the
ports-freeze, so there's plenty of time to hunt for more
FreeBSD-specific bugs in the HAL/dbus-support, too).
